---
description: Trailing whitespace stripped from line
inspector: check-trailing-whitespace
finding: trailing-whitespace-finding
maintainer: fix-trailing-whitespace
resolution: text-resolution
---
(defvar *x* 1)   
---
(:line 1 :column 14 :end-line 1 :end-column 17 :severity :style)
---
(defvar *x* 1)
---
